meta.note: Connection-churn (conn/s) harness aligned to run_perf: same 11 servers (7 runloom tiers + asyncio + uvloop + gevent + go), driven to saturation by measure.ladder() over a ladder of concurrent dialers. Run with: python3 conn_churn.py
